name: llm-guard-kit
summary: v0.20.2: P(True) statistical validation — AUROC 0.759/0.682/0.758 [all CIs above 0.5] across 3 domains (HotpotQA/TriviaQA/2WikiMultiHop, n=60 each, $0 cached); 2Wiki ensemble 0.817 [0.706,0.912]; scope_limitations.md updated. v0.20.1: Publishability fixes — bootstrap CIs for alert precision 0.896 [0.826,0.960], stream_guard AUROC 0.666, naive baseline table. v0.20.0: FARL discovery loop (230 novel failures, 3 modes), MiniJudge AUROC 0.7638.
author: Avighan Majumder
